request.subject: Chemistry

chunks:
## 🦺 Safety Report — Acid-Base Titration

### ⚠️ Risk Level
🟡 Medium — corrosive reagents and glassware.

### 🔬 Hazard Sources
- Strong acid (HCl)
- Strong base (NaOH)
### 🥽 PPE Required
- Safety goggles
- Lab coat
- Nitrile gloves

## 🦺 Safety Report — Frog Dissection
### ⚠️ Risk Level
🟡 Medium
### 🥽 PPE Required
- Gloves
- Goggles
